_comment: LAT-2832 — EN ui_strings-overlay voor drie index-paginas (streken/wijnhuizen/wijnroutes) en de LangheCaptureBlock. De templates zijn al in LAT-2693 gerefactored naar loadUiStrings(locale); zonder deze EN-values valt t() terug op de NL-default. LangheCaptureBlock-keys zijn nieuw: de DevOps-agent voegt ze toe aan UI_STRING_DEFAULTS in ui-strings.ts en refactort het component (zie LAT-2832 subtask). Seeden met: DIRECTUS_URL=... DIRECTUS_TOKEN=... node directus/scripts/seed-ui-strings-en.mjs directus/data/ui-strings-en-lat2832.json
streken.index.meta.title: Wine regions, from Piemonte to the Mosel | VinoMartino
streken.index.meta.description: Explore Europe's great wine regions — terroir, grape varieties, climate and the best producers. In-depth guides for wine lovers.
streken.index.hero.label: Wine regions
streken.index.hero.desc: Piemonte, Etna, Burgundy, Mosel — each region has its own logic of soil, climate and grape variety. I explain them the way I got to know them: by driving there.
streken.index.tier1.label: Personally visited
streken.index.tier1.title: Regions I visited myself
streken.index.tier1.desc: These guides were written after my own visit. Not sure where to start? Begin with the four marked ‘Start here’.
streken.index.tier2.label: Editorial guides
streken.index.tier2.title: Guides by country
streken.index.tier2.desc: Carefully compiled from primary sources and local knowledge, grouped by country.
streken.index.empty.title: The guides are on their way
streken.index.empty.descPre: Piemonte, Etna, Burgundy, Mosel and Priorat are at the top of the list. I would rather write them well than fast — start with the
wijnhuizen.index.meta.title: Wineries, Producers & winemakers | VinoMartino
wijnhuizen.index.meta.description: Explore the wineries behind the bottle — from strong-willed Barolo producers to volcanic pioneers on Etna. Personal portraits of winemakers who truly matter.
wijnhuizen.index.hero.label: Wineries
wijnhuizen.index.hero.desc: Not the bottle, but the people behind it. Winemakers I have visited and spoken with — from old Piedmontese families to radical new-wave producers on Etna.
wijnhuizen.index.empty.title: The portraits are on their way
wijnhuizen.index.empty.descPre: Each winery gets one story, not a scorecard. The first portraits appear once I have the visits behind me. In the meantime, start with the
wijnroutes.index.meta.title: Wine routes, Guide to wine travel | VinoMartino
wijnroutes.index.meta.description: Follow the most beautiful wine routes in the world, from Etna’s steep northern slope to the winding Mosel. Practical routes for wine lovers who head out on their own.
wijnroutes.index.hero.label: Wine routes
wijnroutes.index.hero.desc: Routes I have driven myself — in the Fiat Panda, by train, sometimes with a suitcase too many. Day schedules, places to stay and the producers worth calling two weeks in advance.
wijnroutes.index.map.title: All routes on the map
wijnroutes.index.empty.title: Routes are on their way
wijnroutes.index.empty.descPre: Langhe, Etna, Mosel and Wachau are first on the schedule. In the meantime, the
wijnroutes.index.empty.descPost: already contain logistical details per region.
langhe.capture.a.koptekst: The complete travel planner as a PDF
langhe.capture.a.body: This article covers the essentials. If you actually drive the route, there is more: phone numbers for the wineries, opening hours by season, and a breakdown of what each day costs. All of that is in the compact Langhe PDF I send to everyone who signs up for The Letter.
langhe.capture.a.subCopy: Every two weeks you also receive The Letter: about wine, travel and the people behind it. Unsubscribe any time.
langhe.capture.c.body: Want to know where to begin in the Langhe? I wrote a compact travel planner. Route, wineries, hotels, budget. Sign up for The Letter, and it is yours straight away.
langhe.capture.c.subCopy: Every two weeks The Letter follows: about wine and travel from personal experience.
langhe.capture.email.label: Email address
